name: lesson-system-desktop
author: Lesson System
description: Desktop shell and packaging for lesson-system

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,electron -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env LESSON_SYSTEM_DB_DRIVER=sqljs LESSON_SYSTEM_DATA_DIR=.desktop-data PORT=3000 npm --prefix backend run start:dev
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dist:win:x64: npm run build && npm run dist:win:x64:builder && npm run dist:win:cleanup
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run build && npm run dist:win:arm64:builder && npm run dist:win:cleanup
scripts.dist:win:all: npm run build && npm run dist:win:x64:builder && npm run dist:win:arm64:builder && npm run dist:win:cleanup
